since_last: 35% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.83%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -2.47% · Gold -2.31% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 35% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.83%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.83%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.05%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.34% at $139.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
